primary_variables.matched_definition: Comparison between disease and matched control cohorts.
evidence: we next compared exosomes purified from primary T2D-derived adipocytes (isolated as pre-adipocyte progenitors from patients and differentiated ex vivo) to exosomes purified from adipocytes derived from non-diabetic controls matched by age, sex and BMI
To identify candidate exosome proteins that could account for functional differences between T2D and ND adipocytes, we performed proteomics analysis by mass spectrometry

primary_variables.matched_definition: Intervention using an agonist or activator that increases receptor, pathway, or signaling activity relative to control.
evidence: Results showed that pathways associated with tumor cell aggressiveness (motility, invasion and angiogenesis) were increased in IR exosome payloads compared to IS

Human primary adipocytes were treated with 250 pM recombinant human TNF-α (Abcam, ab9642), and 3T3-L1 adipocytes were treated with 1 nM recombinant mouse TNF-α (Abcam, ab9740), overnight to induce insulin resistance.

attributes.route_or_context: ex vivo treatment of mature adipocytes to induce insulin resistance
evidence: Human primary adipocytes were treated with 250 pM recombinant human TNF-α (Abcam, ab9642), and 3T3-L1 adipocytes were treated with 1 nM recombinant mouse TNF-α (Abcam, ab9740), overnight to induce insulin resistance.

replicate_hints: Biological and biochemical replicates were performed in at least triplicate

evidence: compared exosomes purified from primary T2D-derived adipocytes... to exosomes purified from adipocytes derived from non-diabetic controls
pathways associated with tumor cell aggressiveness (motility, invasion and angiogenesis) were increased in IR exosome payloads compared to IS

base_candidates_ranked.reason: Data-dependent acquisition (DDA) was used on an Orbitrap Exploris 240. While PRIDE metadata mentions 'Spectrum counting', the experimental design compares protein abundance (T2D vs ND) in exosomes, which is typically handled by LFQ or spectral counting in a base DDA workflow.

Data-dependent acquisition (DDA) was used on an Orbitrap Exploris 240. While PRIDE metadata mentions 'Spectrum counting', the experimental design compares protein abundance (T2D vs ND) in exosomes, which is typically handled by LFQ or spectral counting in a base DDA workflow.
